message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #F5DEB3
skinparam participantBorderColor #D2B48C
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantTextAlignment left
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1
skinparam participantBorderColor #D2B48C
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #F5DEB3
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantTextAlignment left
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1

participant "«Android»\nAAOSHAL" as AAOSHAL
participant "«Android»\nAAOSCarAPI" as AAOSCarAPI
participant "AACS_CarControlHandler" as AACS_CarControlHandler
participant "AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver" as AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver
participant "AACS_CoreService" as AACS_CoreService
participant "AutoSDK" as AutoSDK

AAOSHAL -> AAOSCarAPI: HVAC_FAN_SPEED = (0x0500|SYSTEM|3|SEAT)
AAOSCarAPI -> AACS_CarControlHandler: True/Throw Exception
AACS_CarControlHandler -> AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver: True/False
AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver -> AACS_CoreService: Success/Failure (Intent)
AACS_CoreService -> AutoSDK: SetRangeControllerValue Reply (AASB Message)

@enduml
